bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 97.1% across 5 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 5 dates spanning 91–609 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±50.3% ($108.60 – $328.22).

long_term.strategy: Buy 1-year LEAPS call at $197 (10% ITM, 70-delta proxy). Long-cycle trend up + sell-side sees +19.0% upside to $260 PT → ITM LEAPS gives ~80% of stock exposure at ~40% of capital, with limited downside vs holding.
